title: taraxacum calanthodium
intro: Taraxacum calanthodium, also known as the common dandelion, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the sunflower family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum calanthodium include its ability to support liver and kidney function, reduce blood pressure and cholesterol levels, and aid in digestion. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
